---
title: "CV"
---

A full version of my CV is available for download below.

{{< downloadthis Vilane_Goncalves_Sales_CV.pdf label="Download CV (PDF)" type="primary" >}}

---

## Summary

| | |
|---|---|
| **Current Position** | Postdoctoral Researcher, Leibniz Centre for Tropical Marine Research (ZMT), Bremen |
| **Research Areas** | Environmental Economics, Climate Vulnerability, Coastal Systems, Sustainable Tourism, NLP |
| **PhD** | University of Birmingham, UK (2019) |
| **Fellowships** | Marie Skłodowska-Curie (2023–2025), CAPES PhD Abroad (2015–2019) |

For a complete list of publications, teaching, supervision, and professional activities, please [download the full CV](Vilane_Goncalves_Sales_CV.pdf).
